description: Guard against false psychotic-spectrum routing (guard-anxious-inner-voice): description uses category-adjacent vocabulary but is actually anxiety territory. classify should recommend anxiety and leave outOfScope null.

expectedQualities.notes: False-positive guard: description uses psychotic-spectrum-adjacent language but is actually anxiety territory. Should recommend anxiety path, NOT route to outOfScope.

payload.intakeText: My brain just goes a million miles an hour. There's this constant voice in my head criticizing me — you said the wrong thing, they think you're weird, on and on. I know it's just my own anxious self-talk but it sounds like a voice and I can't shut it up. I haven't had a quiet moment in months.
